From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral](/w/index.php?title=Immaculate_Heart_of_Mary_Cathedral&redirect=no "Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral"))

Church in Kottayam, India

The **Immaculate Heart of Mary Cathedral**, also known as the **Vimalagiri Cathedral**[[1]](#cite_note-dna-1) or as ***Angathattu Palli*** located at [Kottayam](/wiki/Kottayam "Kottayam") is the cathedral of the [Diocese of Vijayapuram](/wiki/Roman_Catholic_Diocese_of_Vijayapuram "Roman Catholic Diocese of Vijayapuram").[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] Built in the [Gothic architectural style](/wiki/Gothic_architecture "Gothic architecture"),[[1]](#cite_note-dna-1) the church has a 172-foot tall tower which is one of the tallest church towers in Kerala. The foundation stone of Vimalagiri Church was laid in the year 1956. The construction of the imposing [edifice](/wiki/Edifice "Edifice") was finished in the year 1964. Its feast celebrated on 8 December every year, the feast of the [Immaculate Heart of Mary](/wiki/Immaculate_Heart_of_Mary "Immaculate Heart of Mary").[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b0/Vimalagiri_Cathedral.jpg/250px-Vimalagiri_Cathedral.jpg)](/wiki/File:Vimalagiri_Cathedral.jpg)

Vimalagiri Cathedral
